description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof and a stone or brick exterior, surrounded by a landscaped yard with trees and paved walkways. The front facade features a covered porch supported by columns, providing a sheltered entryway. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The driveway leads to an attached garage, which is integrated into the main structure. The property is bordered by grass lawns and decorative shrubbery, with paved paths connecting the entrance, driveway, and surrounding areas. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, covered porch, attached garage, and landscaped yard with paved walkways and trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angle highlighting the garage, driveway, and side yard with several trees.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the bungalow, emphasizing the covered porch, main entrance, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and opposite side of the bungalow, with the garage and additional windows visible.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the back of the bungalow, showing the rear entrance, paved paths, and more of the backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
